name: autopraxis
description: Self-improving workflow skills for AI agents.

interface.shortDescription: Self-improving workflow skills for AI agents.
interface.longDescription: Autopraxis turns messy goals into grounded briefs, reviewed plans, shipped work, and measured learning loops.
defaultPrompt: Use Autopraxis to turn this goal into a grounded plan and execution workflow.
Use Autopraxis backprop to review prior workflow runs and suggest improvements.
